## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] No new analytics / trackers / phone-home SDKs added
- [ ] No hardcoded colors or spacing — all tokens from `theme/`
- [ ] No user-facing strings inlined — all via `t('key')`
- [ ] Privacy defaults unchanged (or: explicitly discussed in description)
- [ ] If schema changed: `npm run schema:push` tested locally
- [ ] If species added: source cited in `scripts/seed-species.ts`
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` / `CLAUDE.md` read if this is an AI-generated PR
